diversity_basis.citation: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 311.1 — instantaneous loads take full demand

non_compliance_flags.message: Maximum demand ~89 A on 100 A supply leaves only ~11 A headroom — marginal for future-load addition (e.g. EV charger, heat pump). Per BS 7671 § 311.1 the instantaneous 9 kW shower contributes its full 39.1 A; no diversity applies.

assumptions: Diversity computed per IET OSG Appendix A + BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 311.1 (NOT a blanket factor): lighting (domestic) 0.66, standard socket-outlet circuits 100% of largest + 40% of remainder, cooker 10 A + 30% of (Ib − 10 A), instantaneous shower (9 kW ≥ 7.2 kW) 1.00 — no diversity. Per-load-type contributions: lighting 4.30 A + sockets 28.70 A + cooker 16.78 A + shower 39.13 A = 88.91 A maximum demand on a 100 A supply.
Selectivity verification deferred — fault-level intent absent and engineer Ifault not declared per WI3.
Cable ampacity check assumes BS 7671 Appendix 4 Reference Method C (clipped direct).

rationale.chat_summary: 100A TN-C-S consumer unit for a UK 3-bed semi, 12-way Form 1 Hager-style enclosure. 6 final circuits — Type B MCBs grouped behind a main 30mA RCD. Maximum demand ~89 A computed per IET OSG App A + BS 7671 § 311.1 (instantaneous 9 kW shower at 1.00, NO diversity): leaves ~11 A headroom on 100 A supply — marginal for future loads. Selectivity verification pending fault-level intent — emitted as tool_call_pending per WI3. Reply to refine, e.g. 'add EV charger requires supply upgrade' or 'switch to per-circuit RCBOs'.

sections.title: Board Classification
sections.summary: UK domestic consumer unit, IEC 61439-3 DBO Form 1, IP2X for indoor cupboard installation.

decisions.label: Form 1 enclosure
decisions.summary: Standard for domestic CUs — no separation between busbar and functional units required at this rating.

sections.title: Incoming Supply
sections.summary: 230V single-phase 100A main switch from PME supply (Ze 0.35Ω declared).

decisions.label: 100A main switch
decisions.summary: Standard UK domestic main switch rating.

sections.title: Busbar Sizing
sections.summary: 100A busbar, IcW 6kA. Diversity applied per IET OSG App A by LOAD TYPE (NOT a blanket 0.4): lighting (domestic) 0.66 → 4.30 A; standard sockets 100% largest + 40% remainder → 28.70 A; cooker 10 A + 30% remainder → 16.78 A; instantaneous shower 9 kW at 1.00 per BS 7671 § 311.1 → 39.13 A. Total maximum demand = 88.91 A on 100 A supply — adequate but marginal (~11 A headroom).

decisions.label: Per-load-type diversity per IET OSG App A
decisions.summary: Lighting 0.66, sockets 100%+40%, cooker 10A+30%, instantaneous shower 1.00 (no diversity per § 311.1). Blanket 0.4 factor is WRONG — Appendix 1 is informative; per-load-type is the prescribed method.

decisions.label: 100A busbar adequate but marginal
decisions.summary: 88.91 A demand fits 100 A — ~11 A headroom only. Any future-load addition (EV charger, heat pump, second instantaneous shower) requires supply upgrade or load shedding.

sections.title: Way Assignment
sections.summary: 6 ways used (W1–W6), 6 ways spare. Meets engineer-specified minimum 2.

sections.title: OCPD Selection
sections.summary: All MCBs Type B (domestic standard). In ≤ Iz verified for every circuit. Icn 6kA exceeds prospective fault current.

decisions.label: Type B curve for all circuits
decisions.summary: Domestic loads (lighting, sockets, cooker, shower) have no significant inrush.
decisions.rule: BS 7671 Appendix 3 — Type B for general lighting/socket loads

sections.title: RCD Strategy
sections.summary: Type B MCBs grouped behind a single 30mA main RCD (typical UK domestic CU topology). All 6 final circuits gain RCD protection via the upstream main RCD — satisfies BS 7671 411.3.3 (sockets ≤32A in domestic) + Section 701 (bathroom shower). For better resilience, per-circuit RCBOs would isolate single-circuit faults; the engineer can opt to upgrade.

decisions.label: Grouped 30mA Type A main RCD
decisions.summary: Type A handles AC + pulsating DC residual — covers modern electronics. Grouped (vs RCBO-per-circuit) is the cheaper standard CU arrangement.

sections.title: Cable Selection
sections.summary: Cables provided in inputs (twin-and-earth 6242Y typical). All sizes pass In ≤ Iz check at Reference Method C.

sections.title: Selectivity Verification
sections.summary: 6 cascade pairs (MAIN → each MCB) emitted as tool_call_pending. fault-level intent absent; engineer Ifault not declared. Will re-emit once fault-level skill ships.

sections.title: Compliance
sections.summary: Compliant. One warning: maximum demand 88.91 A on 100 A supply is marginal — only ~11 A headroom after applying correct per-load-type diversity per IET OSG App A + BS 7671 § 311.1. One TOOL-CALL-PENDING flag for deferred selectivity.

invariants.evidence: Way accounting (ways_used + ways_spare == ways_total): ways_total=12, 6 circuits declared and seated, 6 spare ways recorded; sum balances. Specialty-board branch not engaged (board_kind='consumer_unit', main_switchboard branch applies).

Busbar rating coverage: 100 A busbar with IcW=6 kA per IEC 61439-3 DBO (consumer unit). Diversified incoming load (After-Diversity Maximum Demand) computed per IET OSG App A is well within 100 A; selectivity_results show selectivity verified to main RCD.

OCPD-cable coordination per BS 7671 §433.1.1: every circuit's In ≤ Iz_corrected for the declared phase_csa (e.g. 32 A MCB on 2.5 mm² ring with Iz=27 A passes via ring-final §433.1.5 special case, 32 A MCB on 6 mm² cooker radial Iz=46 A passes outright).

INV-14 board CU-G (GB → BS): R1 jurisdiction→format mapping (GB/KE → BS 7671 §514) holds; R2 board_label.text+svg populated, no {{}} remnants; R3 board_label.text matches BS format regex; R4 6/6 circuits carry circuit_label.text+svg, no {{}} remnants; R5 every circuit_label.text matches BS circuit regex; R6 tool_call_pending booleans set on all labels.

INV-15 board CU-G (GB): all 6 circuits carry diversity_basis with valid load_type enum + factor_applied in [0.0, 1.0] (Rule 1 PASS). All citations >=20 chars with recognisable clause markers (Reg / § / OSG / Table / CoP / TM) (Rule 2 PASS). Rule 3 N/A (no lift or ev_charger circuits on this board). method_params present where method='largest_plus_remainder_pct' (Rule 4 PASS).
